_comment: SYNCED SNAPSHOT — do not hand-edit. Regenerate with: node scripts/sync-workflow-catalog.mjs (pulls api.esy.com GET /v1/catalog/workflows). Mirrors the platform's published, versioned workflow templates.

items.name: Generate Clip Art Asset
items.description: Generate an internal ESY visual artifact using the clip.art prompt/style contract, provider runtime policy, ESY R2 storage, and review-ready metadata.
items.shortDescription: Generate a reviewable internal clip-art asset.
whatYouGet: ESY R2 raw and processed storage references
